recommendations.title: The Madagascar Penguins in a Christmas Caper
recommendations.overview: During the holiday season, when the animals of the Central Park Zoo are preparing for Christmas, Private, the youngest of the penguins notices that the Polar Bear is all alone. Assured that nobody should have to spend Christmas alone, Private goes in

recommendations.title: Dreamworks: Holiday Classics
recommendations.overview: Join your favourite DreamWorks friends for these four holiday specials. Watch as those zany zoosters from Madagascar save Christmas, Donkey puts on a carolling Christmas Shrek-tacular, and Po prepares for his favourite holiday, the Winter Feast.
recommendations.director: Tim Johnson, Gary Trousdale, David Soren

recommendations.title: Thriller Night
recommendations.overview: A Shrek parody of Michael Jackson's Thriller song and music video, with Donkey singing.

recommendations.title: Beauty and the Beast
recommendations.overview: Follow the adventures of Belle, a bright young woman who finds herself in the castle of a prince who's been turned into a mysterious beast. With the help of the castle's enchanted staff, Belle soon learns the most important lesson of all -- that true

recommendations.title: Atlantis: The Lost Empire
recommendations.overview: A young linguist named Milo Thatch joins an intrepid group of explorers to find the mysterious lost continent of Atlantis.

recommendations.title: Scared Shrekless
recommendations.overview: Shrek challenges Donkey, Puss in Boots and his other fairy tale character friends to spend the night in Lord Farquaad's haunted castle, telling scary stories to see who can resist becoming scared and stay the longest.

recommendations.title: The Hunchback of Notre Dame
recommendations.overview: Isolated bell-ringer Quasimodo wishes to leave Notre Dame tower against the wishes of Judge Claude Frollo, his stern guardian and Paris' strait-laced Minister of Justice. His first venture to the outside world finds him Esmeralda, a kind-hearted and

recommendations.title: Shrek
recommendations.overview: It ain't easy bein' green -- especially if you're a likable (albeit smelly) ogre named Shrek. On a mission to retrieve a gorgeous princess from the clutches of a fire-breathing dragon, Shrek teams up with an unlikely compatriot -- a wisecracking donk

recommendations.title: Shrek 2
recommendations.overview: Happily ever after never seemed so far far away when a trip to meet the in-laws turns into a hilariously twisted adventure for Shrek and Fiona. With the help of his faithful Donkey, Shrek takes on a potion-brewing Fairy Godmother, the pompous Prince
recommendations.director: Conrad Vernon, Kelly Asbury, Andrew Adamson

recommendations.title: The Snow Sister
recommendations.overview: A young boy whose grieving family has forgotten about Christmas forms an unexpected, healing bond with a bubbly girl full of holiday spirit.
